    • Welcome!

    I am a Ph.D. student of Economics at Duke University, intersted in researching questions in the fields of labor and public.

    I maintain a blog to share what I am learning and thinking about. See my first post for an idea of what you can expect.

    To get in touch with me, you can comment on blog posts. All that is required is a (free) GitHub account. You can also email me.
